/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/monitor.dir/src/monitor/main_monitor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/monitor.dir/src/monitor/ui_imgui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/monitor.dir/src/monitor/receptor_telemetria.cpp.o CMakeFiles/monitor.dir/src/monitor/coletor_snapshot.cpp.o CMakeFiles/monitor.dir/imgui/imgui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/monitor.dir/imgui/imgui_draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/monitor.dir/imgui/imgui_tables.cpp.o CMakeFiles/monitor.dir/imgui/imgui_widgets.cpp.o CMakeFiles/monitor.dir/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_glfw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/monitor.dir/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_opengl3.cpp.o -o bin/monitor  librede.a -lglfw /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
